_doc: Edit this file during a live backtest run to change parameters mid-run. Reloaded every cycle automatically.

_fields.bucket_weights: Multiplier per strategy bucket: bull/bear/crypto (0.5-2.0). Higher = more capital allocated.
_fields.min_score_by_tier: Override min composite score floor per stock tier: BLUE_CHIP/LARGE_CAP/SMALL_CAP/SPECULATIVE_MOMENTUM.
_fields.min_score_override: Override min score at bucket level: {bull: 0.60} raises entry bar for all bull stocks.
_fields.max_drawdown_halt: Halt new trades if portfolio drawdown exceeds this fraction (e.g. 0.12 = 12%).
_fields.target_vol_daily: Target daily portfolio volatility (e.g. 0.02 = 2%). Lower = smaller positions.
_fields.max_asset_exposure_pct: Max fraction of equity in a single asset (e.g. 0.08 = 8%).
